name: Sword Burst
desc: A momentary circle of spectral blades sweeps around you. Each creature of your choice within 5 feet must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 Force damage. Damage increases by 1d6 at levels 5, 11, and 17. (Paraphrased homebrew import.)

name: Shape Water
desc: Choose a 5-foot cube of water you can see in range: move or reshape it, change its color or opacity, freeze it (no creatures inside), or animate simple shapes for 1 hour. You can have two non-instantaneous effects active at a time. (Paraphrased homebrew import.)

name: Compelled Duel
desc: One creature you can see must make a Wisdom saving throw or be drawn to duel you: it has Disadvantage on attack rolls against anyone but you, and must save each time it tries to move more than 30 feet from you. The spell ends if you attack another creature, cast a spell at an enemy other than the target, or an ally damages or targets the target. (Paraphrased homebrew import.)

name: Thunderous Smite
desc: Cast immediately after hitting with a melee weapon or Unarmed Strike: the target takes an extra 2d6 Thunder damage, audible 300 feet away, and must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed 10 feet away and knocked Prone. Extra damage increases 1d6 per slot level above 1. (Paraphrased homebrew import of the 2024 version.)

name: Wrathful Smite
desc: Cast immediately after hitting with a melee weapon or Unarmed Strike: the target takes an extra 1d6 Necrotic damage and must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be Frightened of you for 1 minute (repeats the save at the end of its turns). Extra damage increases 1d6 per slot level above 1. (Paraphrased homebrew import of the 2024 version.)

name: Witch Bolt
desc: A crackling arc of lightning: make a ranged spell attack for 2d12 Lightning damage. On a hit, you can use a Bonus Action on later turns to deal 1d12 Lightning damage to the target automatically while it stays within range and in sight. +1d12 initial damage per slot level above 1. (Paraphrased homebrew import of the 2024 version.)

name: Absorb Elements
desc: Reaction when you take Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder damage: you have Resistance to that damage type until the start of your next turn, and the first time you hit with a melee attack on your next turn the target takes an extra 1d6 of that type. +1d6 per slot level above 1. (Paraphrased homebrew import.)

name: Mind Sliver
desc: A disorienting spike of psychic energy: one creature must succeed on an Intelligence saving throw or take 1d6 Psychic damage and subtract 1d4 from its next saving throw before the end of your next turn. Damage increases by 1d6 at levels 5, 11, and 17. (Paraphrased homebrew import.)

name: Feign Death
desc: A willing creature you touch falls into a cataleptic state indistinguishable from death for the duration: Blinded and Incapacitated, Speed 0, Resistance to all damage except Psychic, and disease/poison are suspended. (Paraphrased homebrew import.)

name: Cause Fear
desc: You awaken a creature's sense of mortality: one creature you can see (not undead or a construct) must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be Frightened of you for the duration, repeating the save at the end of each of its turns. One extra target per slot level above 1 (30 feet apart). (Paraphrased homebrew import.)

name: Elementalism
desc: You exert control over the elements in a 5-foot cube: stir or still air, light or snuff small flames, shape a handful of earth, color or ripple water, or create a harmless elemental sensory effect. (Paraphrased homebrew import of the 2024 cantrip.)

name: Mind Spike
desc: A spike of psychic pain: one creature makes a Wisdom saving throw, taking 3d8 Psychic damage on a failure (half on success). On a failure you also always know the target's location while the spell lasts (as long as you're on the same plane), and it can't hide from you. +1d8 per slot level above 2. (Paraphrased homebrew import.)

name: Friends
desc: One humanoid you can see that isn't hostile makes a Wisdom saving throw or has the Charmed condition toward you while the spell lasts; it ends early if you or your companions harm it. When the spell ends, the creature knows it was charmed. (Paraphrased homebrew import of the 2024 version.)
